payload.answer: I can’t remember this article because the URL appears malformed and the fetch failed with a 404 network error. Please provide a working article URL or paste the article text you want remembered.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided URL is malformed and the mock fetch result indicates a 404 network error, so article contents cannot be verified or stored as durable memory.

details: Did not infer article claims from the failed URL.

repair_options: Provide a valid URL for the article.
Paste the article title and text directly.
Provide a brief summary and indicate that it is your own summary, not fetched article content.
